nhtsa.note: Recalls, complaints, crash/fire reports, and safety ratings from NHTSA.gov.

fuel.note: Typical annual fuel cost based on average driving and fuel prices.

charging.note: Typical annual electricity cost for home and public charging.

insurance.note: Average auto insurance expenditures as a share of vehicle value.

registration.note: Average state and local registration fees.

maintenance.note: Average per-mile maintenance and repair costs converted to annual figures.

depreciation.note: Typical multi-year depreciation for mainstream vehicles.
